title: zanthoxylum tumbezanum
intro: Zanthoxylum tumbezanum, also known as Tumbes prickly ash, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, native to the Americas. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of essential oils and alkaloids. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum tumbezanum include pain relief, digestive aid, and antimicrobial activity, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in topical applications such as creams and ointments.
